metadata.name: Flux Bootstrap
metadata.description: Draft Flux bootstrap manifests for wiring an already-installed Flux control plane to a Git repository and root Kustomization, with optional Helm source and release resources.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Bootstraps Flux after the controllers are already installed in the cluster. The template creates a `GitRepository` and root `Kustomization`, with optional `HelmRepository` and `HelmRelease` resources for teams that want a small starter example in the same render.

## Typical Use
- Install Flux controllers first using `flux install`, Helm, or your platform installer.
- Point the `GitRepository` at the repo that contains your cluster state.
- Set the Kustomization path to your cluster root such as `./clusters/prod`.
- Enable SOPS decryption only after the referenced secret already exists in the Flux namespace.

## Notes
- `targetNamespace` is optional but useful when the rendered Kustomization should force resources into a specific namespace.
- `dependsOn` is intentionally kept lightweight with a single dependency placeholder so the template stays readable.
- The optional Helm resources are a convenience stub, not a full GitOps platform layout.

## References
- [Flux GitRepository](https://fluxcd.io/flux/components/source/gitrepositories/)
- [Flux Kustomization](https://fluxcd.io/flux/components/kustomize/kustomizations/)
- [Flux Helm Releases](https://fluxcd.io/flux/guides/helmreleases/)

items.name: namespace
items.title: Flux namespace
items.description: Namespace where Flux source and Kustomization resources live.

items.name: create_namespace
items.title: Create namespace
items.description: Render the Flux namespace manifest as part of this file.

items.name: git_repository_name
items.title: GitRepository name
items.description: Name of the Flux GitRepository resource.

items.name: git_repository_url
items.title: Git repository URL
items.description: HTTPS or SSH URL for the GitOps repository.

items.name: git_branch
items.title: Git branch
items.description: Branch Flux should reconcile from.

items.name: git_interval
items.title: Git interval
items.description: How often Flux fetches the Git repository.

items.name: git_timeout
items.title: Git timeout
items.description: Timeout for Git clone and fetch operations.

items.name: kustomization_name
items.title: Kustomization name
items.description: Name of the root Flux Kustomization resource.

items.name: kustomization_path
items.title: Kustomization path
items.description: Path inside the Git repository that contains the root kustomization.

items.name: kustomization_interval
items.title: Kustomization interval
items.description: How often Flux reconciles the root Kustomization.

items.name: kustomization_timeout
items.title: Kustomization timeout
items.description: Timeout for apply and health-check operations.

items.name: kustomization_prune
items.title: Prune
items.description: Remove resources from the cluster when they disappear from Git.

items.name: kustomization_wait
items.title: Wait
items.description: Wait for reconciled resources to become healthy.

items.name: kustomization_force
items.title: Force
items.description: Force apply resources when immutable field changes require replacement.

items.name: target_namespace_enabled
items.title: Target namespace
items.description: Override the namespace for resources reconciled by this Kustomization.

items.name: target_namespace
items.title: Target namespace value
items.description: Namespace applied to resources when target namespace is enabled.

items.name: depends_on_enabled
items.title: Depends on
items.description: Add a single Flux Kustomization dependency before this root applies.

items.name: depends_on_name
items.title: Dependency name
items.description: Name of the upstream Flux Kustomization dependency.

items.name: git_secret_ref_enabled
items.title: Git secretRef
items.description: Reference a Kubernetes secret for Git authentication.

items.name: git_secret_ref_name
items.title: Git secret name
items.description: Name of the secret used for HTTPS or SSH Git credentials.

items.name: decryption_enabled
items.title: SOPS decryption
items.description: Enable Flux SOPS decryption for encrypted secrets in the Kustomization path.

items.name: decryption_secret_name
items.title: Decryption secret
items.description: Secret name containing the SOPS decryption key material.

items.name: helm_repository_enabled
items.title: HelmRepository
items.description: Render a HelmRepository resource alongside the bootstrap objects.

items.name: helm_repository_name
items.title: HelmRepository name
items.description: Name of the HelmRepository resource or existing source reference.

items.name: helm_repository_url
items.title: HelmRepository URL
items.description: Chart repository URL used by the optional Helm source.

items.name: helm_repository_interval
items.title: HelmRepository interval
items.description: How often Flux refreshes the Helm repository index.

items.name: helm_release_enabled
items.title: HelmRelease
items.description: Render a starter HelmRelease managed by Flux.

items.name: helm_release_name
items.title: HelmRelease name
items.description: Name of the optional HelmRelease resource.

items.name: helm_release_namespace
items.title: HelmRelease namespace
items.description: Namespace where the HelmRelease custom resource should live.

items.name: helm_release_interval
items.title: HelmRelease interval
items.description: How often Flux reconciles the optional Helm release.

items.name: helm_chart_name
items.title: Chart name
items.description: Chart name inside the optional Helm repository.

items.name: helm_chart_version
items.title: Chart version
items.description: Chart version for the optional HelmRelease.

items.name: helm_target_namespace_enabled
items.title: Release target namespace
items.description: Install the optional Helm chart into a different namespace.

items.name: helm_target_namespace
items.title: Release target namespace value
items.description: Namespace where the Helm release should be deployed.
